glosses.claude-fable-5: A person who prepares food, turning raw ingredients into something ready to be eaten, characteristically by the application of heat, whether as an occupation or on a particular occasion.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: A person who prepares food for eating by applying heat to it, whether as a profession, occupation, or regular household activity.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A person who prepares food for eating, especially by applying heat and combining or otherwise treating ingredients.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: A person who prepares food for eating, especially by applying heat to ingredients and combining or transforming them into a dish.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A person whose work or regular role is to prepare food for eating, especially by combining ingredients and applying heat.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: A person who prepares food for eating, especially by applying heat and combining or otherwise treating ingredients.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of lightly touching something in passing, so that a moving body comes for a moment into slight contact with it and then continues on without stopping.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of touching something lightly and momentarily while moving past it, in which a moving body or object brushes the surface of another without stopping or striking it with force.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of touching something lightly or partially while moving past it, without stopping or striking it directly; a brushing contact in passing.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: An act of making light, momentary contact with someone or something while moving past it, without a direct collision or interruption of motion.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of moving past something while making brief, light contact with its surface, rather than stopping against it or striking it directly.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: An act in which a moving person or thing lightly touches the surface of another thing as it passes by, without stopping or entering into sustained contact.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of touching something lightly and momentarily while moving past it, in which a moving body or object brushes the surface of another without stopping or striking it with force.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The quality of being of little importance or consequence, so slight or trifling that it merits no serious concern or attention.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The quality of a thing whereby it is of very slight importance or consequence, such that no harm follows if people give it no attention or concern.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The quality of being trivial, of little consequence, or unworthy of serious consideration; the condition of having small scope or insignificant effect.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The quality of being of little importance, consequence, or seriousness, owing to narrow scope, meagre effect, or concern with matters that do not merit sustained attention.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: A quality of being of little importance or seriousness, marked by narrow concern with minor matters or by an unserious, frivolous purpose.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A quality of having such slight importance or substance that it merits little serious attention and may seem frivolous.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The quality of being of little importance, consequence, or seriousness, owing to narrow scope, meagre effect, or concern with matters that do not merit sustained attention.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: A person whose moral or artistic condition has declined from a former better state, given over to self-indulgence and lacking the discipline or restraint that others judge good.
glosses.claude-fable-5: A person whose conduct or creative work has sunk from earlier standards of moral or artistic worth, given over to self-indulgent pleasure rather than to what is good.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: A person who has undergone moral or artistic decline from a formerly higher standard, having abandoned principle or craft in favor of excess, artifice, or corruption.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A person whose moral character or artistic practice has markedly deteriorated from an earlier or accepted standard, typically through self-indulgence, excessive refinement, or abandonment of disciplined restraint.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: A person whose conduct or creative work has fallen from an earlier standard into moral corruption or artistic deterioration, whether through weakened values or diminished artistic vitality.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A person whose conduct or artistic work manifests decline from an earlier standard of moral seriousness, discipline, or cultural vitality, often through self-indulgence, artificiality, or corruption.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: A person whose moral character or artistic practice has markedly deteriorated from an earlier or accepted standard, typically through self-indulgence, excessive refinement, or abandonment of disciplined restraint.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: A deliberate action that someone takes as a first step toward a purpose, arising from their having decided to do it.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of settling upon a course of action; the mental step by which a person, having considered a matter, resolves to do a particular thing.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: An act or decision to do something; a deliberate step taken toward some end, especially one made in response to a situation or as part of a sequence of purposeful actions.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: An act by which someone decides to do something, thereby adopting it as an intended course of action.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: An act by which someone settles upon undertaking something, especially a deliberate step intended to bring about a particular result.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A decision to undertake a particular course of action, especially as an initial or strategic step toward an aim or in response to a situation.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: A condition of a person's mind at a given time, comprising how one is thinking, what one knows or believes, and how these processes stand; the current disposition of someone's mental activity.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The condition of a person's mind at a given time, constituted by what that person is then thinking and knowing; the overall standing of mental activity as it is at that moment.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: A condition at a particular moment in which someone's thoughts, awareness, and mental processes exist in a certain way; how someone is thinking or knowing at that time.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A condition of a person's mind at a particular time, constituted by the current operation and contents of thinking, knowing, remembering, perceiving, attending, and understanding.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: A condition of a person's mental processes at a particular time, characterized by how the person thinks, knows, attends, remembers, or understands.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A condition of a person's mental life, constituted by the ways in which that person is thinking, knowing, or otherwise processing information at a given time.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: A condition of a person's mind at a particular time, constituted by the current operation and contents of thinking, knowing, remembering, perceiving, attending, and understanding.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: Someone or something that marks or perceives the difference between two things, treating them as not the same rather than as one and the same.
glosses.claude-fable-5: A person, or a thing, that discerns or marks distinctions, recognizing when one thing is not the same as another and treating the two accordingly as unlike.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: A person or thing that makes distinctions or perceives differences between entities, setting one apart from another by identifying what is not the same.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A person or thing that discerns, marks, reveals, or produces a distinction between two or more entities.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: A person or thing that marks one person or thing as unlike another by supplying, revealing, or embodying a salient feature that sets it apart.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A person or thing that distinguishes one thing, kind, or case from another by recognizing, marking, or producing a difference between them.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: A person or thing that makes distinctions or perceives differences between entities, setting one apart from another by identifying what is not the same.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of removing a powerful person from a position of rule or authority, so that afterward they no longer hold the high standing over others that they held before.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of forcibly removing a powerful person, such as a ruler or high officeholder, from the position of authority they occupy, so that they no longer hold its power over others.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of removing someone from a position of power or authority, causing them to cease holding the office or rank they formerly occupied.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act of removing a powerful person from a position of authority or public office, thereby ending that person's tenure and power in the role.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of removing a powerful person from a position of authority, so that they no longer hold that standing.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: The act of removing a powerful person from an office or position of authority, ending that person's tenure and control within the relevant group.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of removing a powerful person from a position of authority, so that they no longer hold that standing.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: A settled sense of one's own worth: the state in which a person thinks well of themselves and, on that account, feels good about the kind of person they are.
glosses.claude-fable-5: A feeling of satisfaction and confidence directed toward oneself, grounded in the judgment that one is a good person capable of doing good things.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: A feeling of satisfaction and approval directed toward oneself, grounded in a sense of one's own value and capability; the regard in which one holds oneself.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A favourable sense of one's own worth, arising from the judgment that one's character or abilities merit respect.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: A favorable feeling a person has toward themselves, grounded in a positive assessment of their own worth, qualities, or achievements.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A feeling of satisfaction with the person one is, founded on a favourable sense of one's own worth, abilities, or conduct.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: A feeling of satisfaction and approval directed toward oneself, grounded in a sense of one's own value and capability; the regard in which one holds oneself.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: A person who receives money as their own in return for doing work for another, so that what is paid to them becomes rightfully theirs because of the labor they perform.
glosses.claude-fable-5: A person who receives money in return for labor, obtaining wages from another for work performed and living on what that work brings in.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: A person who receives payment or wages in return for work performed; someone engaged in labor who thereby obtains money or goods as compensation.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A person who receives monetary compensation from an employer in return for work performed under an employment arrangement.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: A person who receives regular money payments as compensation for labor performed for another person.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A person who receives wages from an employer as payment for work performed, typically through regular employment.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: A person who receives payment or wages in return for work performed; someone engaged in labor who thereby obtains money or goods as compensation.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of deliberately bringing about the death of a person who is suffering, especially from an incurable illness, doing so gently and without pain in order to release them from that suffering.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of deliberately ending another person's life without pain, undertaken so that a person whose suffering cannot otherwise be relieved is released from that suffering by death.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of deliberately ending the life of someone who is suffering from a terminal or incurable illness, performed in a way intended to cause minimal pain and to relieve their suffering.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act of deliberately causing a person's death by a method intended to cause little or no pain, generally as a merciful release from severe suffering associated with an incurable condition.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of deliberately causing a person to die without physical pain, especially to end severe suffering arising from an incurable illness.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: An act of deliberately ending a person's life without causing pain, usually to relieve the suffering of someone with an incurable and grievous illness.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: An act of deliberately ending a person's life without causing pain, usually to relieve the suffering of someone with an incurable and grievous illness.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The state in which two or more things are the same in some respect that can be measured or valued, neither being greater or lesser than the other, so that they stand on the same footing.
glosses.claude-fable-5: A state in which two things or persons stand at the same level of value, measure, or standing, each being like the other and neither surpassing the other in the respect compared.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: A state or condition in which two or more things are the same in some respect of value, magnitude, status, or standing, neither exceeding nor falling short of the other.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A state of correspondence between persons or things that do not materially differ in the measure, value, rank, or standing under consideration.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: A state in which two or more things have the same essential character, measure, or standing in the respect under comparison, so that neither exceeds the other in that respect.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A state in which two things are matched in essential worth, rank, quantity, or effect, so that neither exceeds nor falls short of the other.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: A state in which two things or persons stand at the same level of value, measure, or standing, each being like the other and neither surpassing the other in the respect compared.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: A person who, on the death of another, receives that person's property as its rightful successor, whether by law or by the wishes the dead person set down beforehand.
glosses.claude-fable-5: A person to whom the possessions of another pass upon that other's death, being designated to receive them by the operation of law or by the deceased's declared testamentary wishes.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: A person who is legally entitled to receive and possess the property, title, or estate of another upon that person's death, either by the terms of a will or by operation of law.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A person entitled under law or a valid will to receive another person's property upon that person's death.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: A person who, by law or by the terms of another person's will, has the right to receive that person's estate after the other's death.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A person legally entitled, by descent or under a valid will, to receive the property of another person when that person dies.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: A person legally entitled, by descent or under a valid will, to receive the property of another person when that person dies.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of giving a living being a substance that harms the body from within, done because one wants that being to die of it.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of causing a person or animal to take into its body a substance whose presence there can bring about death, done with the purpose that the victim should die.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of administering poison to a person or animal with the deliberate intention to cause death; a harmful action involving the ingestion or introduction of a toxic substance into a body.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: An act of administering a toxic substance to a person or animal with the deliberate purpose of causing that being's death.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The deliberate act of giving a poisonous substance to a person or animal with the purpose of causing that living being to die.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: An act of administering a toxic substance to a person or animal with the purpose of causing that person or animal to die.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: An act of administering a toxic substance to a person or animal with the deliberate purpose of causing that being's death.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: A state of intense agitation and turmoil, in which many people feel strongly stirred up and things happen in a disorderly, forceful way.
glosses.claude-fable-5: A state of violent agitation and unrest among a body of people, in which feelings run high, disorder spreads, and those caught up in it are stirred toward drastic action whose outcome none can foresee.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: A state of intense agitation, turmoil, and heightened emotion within a group, in which people feel strongly disturbed and excitement builds toward outward action or conflict.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A state of extreme agitation and disorder, especially among a body of people, in which intense passions and conflict threaten to break into open violence.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: A state of intense collective agitation in which many people are deeply stirred and disorderly actions or events occur with violent force.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A state of violent social disturbance and heightened collective excitement, in which people are stirred to conflict or rebellion and ordinary public order is seriously unsettled.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: A state of intense agitation and turmoil, in which many people feel strongly stirred up and things happen in a disorderly, forceful way.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: A person who has something in their keeping or possession and keeps it there over a period of time, whether an object, a title, or a right.
glosses.claude-fable-5: A person in whose keeping or possession something is, whether grasped physically, kept under control, or owned by right, so that it is with this person and at this person's disposal.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: A person who has or possesses something, either by holding it physically in hand or body, or by possessing it as a legal or rightful owner.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A person who has something in their possession, custody, or control, whether physically retained or possessed by recognized right or entitlement.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: A person who keeps something in hand, in custody, or in possession, whether briefly or for an extended period.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A person who has something in possession, custody, or control, whether by physically keeping it, retaining it, or being entitled to it.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: A person who has something in possession, custody, or control, whether by physically keeping it, retaining it, or being entitled to it.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of calling off something that had been arranged or planned, declaring that it will not take place after all, so that the intended event does not happen.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of declaring that a previously arranged event or undertaking will not take place, so that what others had been given to expect does not happen.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of withdrawing or nullifying a prior commitment, agreement, or arrangement by formally announcing that it will no longer take place or be honored.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: An act that withdraws a previously made arrangement, so that what had been agreed or scheduled is no longer to occur.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of withdrawing an agreed arrangement before its intended fulfilment, thereby declaring that the event it provides for is not to take place.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: An act by which a person calls off a previously arranged event, agreement, or service, deciding that it will not take place or continue as planned.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The state of something's having within it some foreign, harmful, or unclean substance that does not belong there, so that the thing is thereby made bad or unfit.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The state of a substance, place, or body in which some harmful or impure matter is present within it, so that the whole is thereby made unclean or unfit and is something people wish free of it.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The condition or state in which something has been made unclean or impure by the addition of an unwanted or harmful substance, so that it is no longer fit for its proper use or purpose.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A state in which unwanted matter is present in or on something, making it impure, unclean, or potentially harmful.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: A state in which an unwanted or harmful foreign substance is present in or on something, impairing its purity, condition, or suitability for use.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A state in which something has been rendered impure, unclean, or unfit for use by the presence or admixture of harmful or unwanted matter.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: A state in which unwanted matter is present in or on something, making it impure, unclean, or potentially harmful.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: A person who does something without thinking about its effect on others, in a way that causes other people to feel annoyed or badly affected.
glosses.claude-fable-5: A person who does something inconsiderate or irritating, acting without thought for how the act affects other people and thereby causing them displeasure or inconvenience.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: A person who acts in a way that is thoughtless, foolish, or annoying to others; someone who does something that causes trouble or irritation without proper consideration of the consequences.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A person who, without due consideration for others, does something foolish, troublesome, or irritating to them.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: A person who performs an act that others regard as thoughtless or irritating, often provoking annoyance or exasperation.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A person who acts without due consideration for others or in a way that irritates or inconveniences them.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: A person who, without due consideration for others, does something foolish, troublesome, or irritating to them.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act by which someone brings something into being for the first time, causing to exist what did not exist before, so that thereafter it is present in the world.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of bringing something new into being or into practice for the first time, whereby someone's doing causes a thing to exist that did not exist before.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of bringing something into being for the first time; a starting or founding of something new that did not exist before.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act of causing something to begin or become established for the first time, thereby bringing a new activity, practice, condition, or organization into being or operation.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of causing something to begin or occur for the first time, or of bringing a new undertaking, practice, organization, or idea into use or awareness.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: The act by which a person brings something into existence or operation for the first time, thereby establishing it as something new.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of bringing something new into being or into practice for the first time, whereby someone's doing causes a thing to exist that did not exist before.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: A person believed able to communicate with the spirits of the dead and to convey messages between them and living people, acting as a channel through which the dead are said to speak.
glosses.claude-fable-5: A person held to possess the power of receiving communications from the spirits of dead people, and who conveys what the dead say to living people, serving as a channel between the two.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: A person who claims to communicate with spirits of the dead or to convey messages between the living and the deceased, serving as a channel or intermediary for such supernatural contact.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A person believed capable of receiving messages from the spirits of dead people and conveying them to the living.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: A person who serves as an intermediary in communication between living people and the dead, receiving or conveying messages across the boundary between life and death.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A person believed to act as a channel of communication between living people and the spirits of the dead, conveying information or messages from the latter to the former.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: A person believed able to communicate with the spirits of the dead and to convey messages between them and living people, acting as a channel through which the dead are said to speak.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of adding a substance to food so as to give it a stronger or better taste before it is eaten.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of adding salt, a spice, herbs, or another flavouring substance to food during its preparation, done so that the food will taste better to those who eat it.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of adding a flavoring substance to food in order to enhance or alter its taste.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act of adding a flavoring substance to food in order to alter or enhance its taste.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of applying a flavouring substance to food, usually during preparation or serving, in order to impart or intensify its taste.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: The act of adding a flavouring substance, such as salt, herbs, or spices, to food in order to alter or enhance its taste.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of adding a flavoring substance to food in order to alter or enhance its taste.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: A person who fails to give due care, attention, or regard to people or duties, leaving undone what one ought to do for them.
glosses.claude-fable-5: A person who habitually gives little care, attention, or regard to the people or duties that have a claim on it, leaving them slighted or unattended.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: A person who habitually fails to give proper care, attention, or respect to someone or something for which they bear responsibility; one who does not do what they should for another.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A person who habitually fails to give due attention, care, or regard to another person or to a responsibility entrusted to them.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: A person who habitually gives too little attention or respect to other people or to responsibilities entrusted to them, consequently failing to care for those people or carry out those responsibilities as required.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A person who habitually gives too little attention or care to people or responsibilities that properly call for it, thereby failing to do what is needed for them.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: A person who habitually gives too little attention or respect to other people or to responsibilities entrusted to them, consequently failing to care for those people or carry out those responsibilities as required.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of adjusting something so that it comes to be as good as it can be, changing it until no further change could make it better.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of making something as good as it can be; a deliberate working upon a thing so that it comes to be in the best condition attainable, such that no further improvement is possible.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act or process of making something as good, efficient, or effective as possible; arranging or adjusting the elements of a system so that it performs or functions in the best possible way.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: An act or process of arranging or adjusting something so that, for a given purpose and within relevant constraints, its performance or outcome is as good as possible.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of making something as good or effective as possible according to a specified aim, usually by selecting or adjusting the conditions that determine its result.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: The act or process of making something as good, effective, or advantageous as possible in relation to a stated purpose or set of conditions.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act or process of making something as good, effective, or advantageous as possible in relation to a stated purpose or set of conditions.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: A person who directs and manages the work of a body of people, having authority over them and telling them what they are to do so that things are done as this person wants.
glosses.claude-fable-5: A person charged with directing and managing an organization, who decides and tells its members what they are to do, whose word they act upon, and who keeps watch over what they do.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: A person who has the authority and responsibility to direct and manage an organization or enterprise, making decisions about its work and overseeing the conduct of those who carry it out.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A person formally responsible for directing an organization's activities and administering its affairs, including coordinating the work of those within it.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: A person who exercises authority over an organization, directing its work and administering its activities.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A person responsible for guiding and administering the work of an organization, exercising authority over its people and operations so that they act in accordance with the person's direction.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: A person responsible for guiding and administering the work of an organization, exercising authority over its people and operations so that they act in accordance with the person's direction.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of coming up to a place or passing into it, so that one comes to be near or inside where one was not before.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of drawing near to or going into a place, a movement by which someone who was not within it comes to be present inside it.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of coming to or reaching a place, especially one that is restricted or difficult to enter; a movement by which someone passes from outside to a position within or at a destination.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act by which someone or something comes near to, reaches, or passes into a place or other destination.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of someone approaching or entering a place, especially a building, so as to come near it or within its boundaries.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: The act by which someone or something comes near to, or passes into, a place or other object of approach.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act by which someone or something comes near to, or passes into, a place or other object of approach.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: A person who abandons an effort or undertaking too readily, ceasing to persist as soon as difficulty arises rather than continuing toward what was begun.
glosses.claude-fable-5: A person disposed to abandon an undertaking at the first sign of difficulty, ceasing to pursue what was begun rather than persevering through even minor hardship.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: A person who abandons an undertaking or effort before completing it, especially one who does so when difficulty arises or when perseverance would be expected or valued.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A person habitually disposed to abandon an undertaking prematurely, especially upon encountering difficulty or discouragement, rather than persist until it is completed.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: A person who abandons an undertaking or stops trying at the first or slightest difficulty, without persisting toward its completion.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A person who readily abandons an effort, task, or undertaking when it becomes difficult, rather than persisting until its proper end.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: A person who readily abandons an effort, task, or undertaking when it becomes difficult, rather than persisting until its proper end.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of moving from one place to another on foot, by setting one's legs in motion at an ordinary unhurried pace.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of going somewhere on foot; a sustained movement in which a person, using the legs in alternating steps, carries the body from one place toward another at an unhurried pace.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of moving from one place to another on foot at a normal pace, typically undertaken for exercise, travel, or leisure.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: An act of locomotion in which a person moves from place to place on foot, alternately advancing the legs while always keeping at least one foot against the supporting surface.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of moving on foot from one place toward another, ordinarily by a succession of steps rather than by running.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A self-propelled journey made on foot, ordinarily at a moderate pace by successive alternating steps, whether undertaken for transport, exercise, or pleasure.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of moving from one place to another on foot, by setting one's legs in motion at an ordinary unhurried pace.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: A person who does the same thing more than once, doing again at a later time what they have already done before.
glosses.claude-fable-5: A person who does the same thing again after having done it once, returning to an act or experience on many further occasions.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: A person who does or experiences the same thing multiple times; especially one who attends or participates in an event, activity, or venue repeatedly rather than only once.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A person who performs on a later occasion an action already performed before, often doing the same thing many times.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: A person who performs the same act or undergoes the same experience more than once, doing so again after an earlier occurrence.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A person who does the same thing again on a later occasion, rather than doing it only once.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: A person who performs the same act or undergoes the same experience more than once, doing so again after an earlier occurrence.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of moving a large group of animals together across country on foot, someone guiding and urging them so that they travel from one place to another over land.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of moving a herd of animals overland under human direction, in which people make many animals travel together across country for a long time from one place to another distant place.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of moving a herd of animals from one place to another by driving them forward, typically over a long distance or across open country.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The organized act of causing and guiding a herd of animals to travel together across land.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of directing a herd of animals to travel together across land from one place to another.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: The act of causing a herd of animals to travel over land from one place to another by directing and urging their movement.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of directing a herd of animals to travel together across land from one place to another.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: A worker who shapes metal into things, characteristically by striking it with repeated blows while it is heated soft, forming useful objects from it.
glosses.claude-fable-5: A craftsman who shapes metal into objects, characteristically by heating it until it is soft and then beating it repeatedly with a hammer to give it the desired form.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: A person who shapes metal by heating it until it becomes soft and malleable, then hammering or otherwise working it into desired forms; a craftsperson skilled in metalworking.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A craftsperson who makes or repairs metal objects, especially by heating and hammering the material while it is malleable.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: A person who shapes and forms metal, especially by striking it with a hammer while heat has made it malleable.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A craft worker who shapes metal into useful or decorative objects, especially by heating it until pliable and forming it with repeated blows.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: A craft worker who shapes metal into useful or decorative objects, especially by heating it until pliable and forming it with repeated blows.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of formally delivering a legal document, such as a writ or summons, to a person, so that this person comes to know of a demand or proceeding that concerns them and is bound to respond to it.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of formally delivering a writ, summons, or other legal document into the hands of the person it concerns, thereby giving that person binding notice of what a court or authority requires of them.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of delivering an official legal document such as a writ or summons to a person, thereby notifying them of a legal proceeding or obligation.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The formal act of delivering a writ, summons, or other judicial document to a person in the manner prescribed by law, thereby giving official notice of legal proceedings or obligations.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of formally delivering a court-issued writ or summons to a person, thereby giving that person legally recognized notice of a proceeding and any required response.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: The formal act of delivering a writ, summons, or other legal notice to the person concerned in the manner required to inform them that legal proceedings have begun or require a response.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of formally delivering a writ, summons, or other legal document into the hands of the person it concerns, thereby giving that person binding notice of what a court or authority requires of them.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: A person who parts with money wastefully and without restraint, spending much on many things so that little is kept, heedless of the loss it brings.
glosses.claude-fable-5: A person who habitually squanders money or resources, using up what he or she possesses freely and quickly, with no thought for future want or for the ill that may follow.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: A person who spends money freely and excessively, without regard for saving or future need; someone inclined by habit or disposition to use up money rapidly and wastefully.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A person who habitually uses money in excessive and wasteful amounts, with little regard for future needs or the limits of their means.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: A person who uses money with reckless lavishness and little regard for conserving it.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: Someone who habitually uses money or other resources in excessive and wasteful amounts, without prudent restraint or regard for future needs.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: A person who habitually uses money in excessive and wasteful amounts, with little regard for future needs or the limits of their means.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of holding something and moving with it from one place to another, so that the thing goes along with the one who bears it.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of holding something with the body or hands and moving with it for some time, so that the thing goes along wherever its bearer goes.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of holding or bearing something in one's hands or on one's body and moving it from one place to another while maintaining contact with it.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: An act in which someone conveys a person or thing from one place to another while bearing its weight or otherwise keeping it supported.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of moving something from one place to another while supporting its weight, typically by holding it in or against the body.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: The act of moving something from one place to another while holding, supporting, or otherwise bearing its weight oneself.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of holding or bearing something in one's hands or on one's body and moving it from one place to another while maintaining contact with it.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: A person who owns one or more shares in a business company, thereby holding a portion of it and a claim on part of what it earns.
glosses.claude-fable-5: An investor who possesses one or more of the transferable units into which a corporation's capital is divided, thereby having a proportionate claim on the company's profits and, typically, a voice in its governance.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: A person who owns one or more shares of stock in a corporation, thereby holding a fractional claim on the company's assets and profits.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A person who owns one or more of the units into which a corporation's equity is divided, and thereby has a proportional financial interest in that corporation.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: A person who possesses one or more shares issued by a corporation, thereby holding a financial ownership interest in that corporation.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A person who owns one or more units of equity issued by a corporation, thereby possessing a proportional legal and financial interest in that enterprise.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of letting something fall, releasing one's hold on it so that it moves downward toward a lower place.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of releasing something that one holds so that it falls; a letting-go by which the thing ceases to be in one's grasp and moves downward.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of letting something fall from one's grasp or a height, so that it moves downward under its own weight until it reaches the ground or another surface below.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act of ceasing to hold or support something, so that it falls freely from a higher position to a lower one.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act in which someone lets something go, causing it to move downward from a higher position to a lower one.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: An act in which someone releases an object from grasp or support, causing it to move downward toward a lower place or surface.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of letting something fall, releasing one's hold on it so that it moves downward toward a lower place.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: A person who deliberately brings about their own death, doing something with the aim that they should cease to live.
glosses.claude-fable-5: A person who deliberately ends his or her own life; one who, wanting to die, does something to himself or herself that causes his or her own death.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: A person who deliberately and intentionally ends their own life by causing their own death.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A person who deliberately brings about his or her own death by an act undertaken for that purpose.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: A person who intentionally causes their own death by performing an act directed against themselves with the purpose of dying.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A person who intentionally brings about their own death by an act directed against themselves.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: A person who deliberately and intentionally ends their own life by causing their own death.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of making something as small in amount, degree, or extent as it can possibly be, so that after it is done the thing cannot be made smaller.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of deliberately lessening something in amount, degree, or extent to the lowest point attainable, so that after the act it cannot be made any smaller.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of making something as small, slight, or insignificant as possible; a deliberate reduction of something toward its least extent or lowest degree.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act of making something as little in amount, as slight in degree, or as low in position as circumstances permit.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of making something as small, slight, or low as possible in amount, degree, or position.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: An act by which someone deliberately makes something as small as possible in amount, degree, or relative position.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of making something as small, slight, or low as possible in amount, degree, or position.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: A person who remains alive after another person has died, continuing to live at a time when that other person no longer does.
glosses.claude-fable-5: A person who remains alive after the death of another, continuing to live beyond the time at which that other person has died.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: A person who remains alive after another person or others have died, especially one who outlasts a specific person or continues to live after a time of danger or calamity.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A person who remains alive after another person has died.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: A person who remains alive after another person has died, thereby living longer than that person.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A person who remains alive after another person has died, thereby outliving that other person.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: A person who remains alive after another person has died, continuing to live at a time when that other person no longer does.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act or process of greatly reducing the amount of something, so that after it there is much less of that thing than there was before.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of markedly reducing the quantity or store of something, so that where much of it existed before, only a small amount remains afterward.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act or process of reducing the amount or quantity of something substantially, so that much less of it remains than before.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: An act or process by which the amount or supply of something is markedly reduced, leaving substantially less of it than there was before.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of bringing about a marked reduction in the amount or availability of something.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: An act that greatly reduces the amount of something, leaving substantially less of it available afterward.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act or process of greatly reducing the amount of something, so that after it there is much less of that thing than there was before.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: A person adept at devising the particular moves and manoeuvres by which an aim is achieved, thinking out well in advance how best to act in order to gain an advantage.
glosses.claude-fable-5: A person adept at devising the immediate moves and maneuvers by which an aim is achieved, able to judge in advance of acting which particular actions will bring about the wanted result.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: A person who is skilled in devising and executing practical plans to achieve specific objectives, especially in military, political, or competitive contexts; someone adept at arranging means and timing actions to gain advantage.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A person adept at devising practical courses of action to secure particular, usually immediate, objectives, especially by selecting and arranging effective means under the circumstances.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: A person skilled in devising and arranging courses of action in advance, especially by anticipating circumstances and selecting effective steps to secure a desired result.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A person skilled at devising practical courses of action for attaining an objective, especially by judging the likely positions and actions of others in a situation.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: A person adept at devising practical courses of action to secure particular, usually immediate, objectives, especially by selecting and arranging effective means under the circumstances.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of causing something to become less strong than it was before, so that its force, power, or capacity is diminished.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of diminishing the strength or force of something, so that afterwards it is less able to act, resist, or endure than it was before.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act or process of making something less strong, powerful, or effective; a diminishing of force, intensity, or capacity.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act of diminishing the power, force, effectiveness, or capacity for resistance possessed by something.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of causing something to possess less strength, force, effectiveness, or intensity than it possessed previously.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: An act that reduces the strength or effectiveness of something, making it less able to resist force, perform its function, or endure strain.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act or process of making something less strong, powerful, or effective; a diminishing of force, intensity, or capacity.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: A person who is required to give a part of what belongs to them, especially money, to the body that governs the place where they live, as a duty owed for living under its authority.
glosses.claude-fable-5: A person from whom the governing authority of the place where they live requires the periodic surrender of part of their money for public purposes, and who renders these compulsory contributions.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: A person who is required by law to pay a sum of money to the government or a public authority, calculated typically as a proportion of income or property value.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A person who transfers money to a government in discharge of a compulsory public charge levied on income, property, transactions, or comparable grounds.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: A person who makes compulsory payments to a public authority for the support of public revenue.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A person who is legally required to make payments to a public authority in support of its revenues.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act or process by which an opening is made wider, so that it comes to be larger than it was before.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of causing an opening or aperture to become wider, so that the gap through which something can pass grows larger than it was before.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The process or act of becoming larger in area or volume, especially of an opening, passageway, or bodily cavity; an expansion from a smaller to a larger state.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act or process of making an aperture wider, or of its becoming wider, through an increase in the open space between its boundaries.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of making an opening wider, thereby increasing the space through which something can pass.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: The act of making an opening larger, especially an opening in a body or bounded surface, so that its width or capacity is increased.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of making an opening wider, thereby increasing the space through which something can pass.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: A person who, at a gathering, speaks words wishing good to another person or to some undertaking, calling on those present to drink together in honour of what is wished well.
glosses.claude-fable-5: A person who, in the company of others, speaks in honour of someone or some undertaking, voicing the wish that good fortune and well-being attend them, and drinks in token of that wish.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: A person who raises a glass and speaks words wishing health, happiness, or success to another person or an undertaking, typically as part of a social gathering or ceremony.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A person who ceremonially raises a drink and calls upon companions to drink in honor of a person or undertaking, expressing a wish for that person's health or the undertaking's success.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: A person who invites others to drink in honour of another’s well-being or a venture’s success, or who drinks for that commemorative purpose.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: A person who, in a social ceremony, invites others to drink in honour of a person or undertaking, publicly expressing good wishes for that person's or undertaking's health or success.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of causing something to reach the greatest degree, amount, or extent it can, by acting so that it becomes as large as is possible.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of raising something to the greatest degree, amount, or level that it can attain, so that afterwards no further increase is possible.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act or process of making something as great, large, or intense as possible; bringing something to its highest achievable degree or extent.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act of increasing something until it reaches the highest degree, condition, or position that can be attained.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of causing something to reach the greatest level, degree, or position that circumstances permit.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: An act of increasing something until it reaches the greatest degree, amount, condition, or position that can be attained.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: An act of increasing something until it reaches the greatest degree, amount, condition, or position that can be attained.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of breaking a small piece away from the surface or edge of a hard thing, so that afterward that piece is no longer part of it.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of breaking one or more small pieces from the surface or edge of a hard or brittle object, typically by a blow, so that the fragments come away from it.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of striking or cutting away small pieces or fragments from the surface or edge of something, typically with a tool or sharp object.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act of breaking or cutting a small fragment away from a larger object, so that the fragment becomes detached from the remaining material.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: An act in which a small piece is broken away from a solid thing, usually by a blow or a sharp implement, leaving the main body diminished.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: An act by which someone strikes, cuts, or otherwise breaks a small piece from the edge or surface of something hard.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of breaking a small piece away from the surface or edge of a hard thing, so that afterward that piece is no longer part of it.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of separating one thing from another with which it had been joined or connected, so that afterward the two are no longer together.
glosses.claude-fable-5: An act by which someone separates a thing from another thing or grouping with which it has been joined, so that afterwards the two no longer stand together as one connected whole.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of breaking or ceasing a connection, relationship, or association with someone or something; a deliberate distancing or separation from a group, person, or enterprise.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act of severing an established connection between a person or thing and another person, thing, or group.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of separating a person or thing from another with which it was connected, so that the prior relation between them no longer holds.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: An act by which someone removes a person or thing from a group, activity, or relationship with which it has been connected, thereby ending that connection.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of severing an established connection between a person or thing and another person, thing, or group.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of dividing something into thin, flat pieces by drawing a sharp edge through it, so that what was one whole becomes several separate parts.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of dividing something with a sharp edge into a series of thin, broad pieces, so that what was one body becomes many similar flat portions.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of cutting something into thin, flat pieces by using a sharp instrument to divide it along a surface, separating the pieces from one another.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act of dividing something into thin, broad pieces by passing a sharp edge through it.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of dividing an object or substance into thin, separate portions by passing a sharp edge through it, usually in repeated strokes.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: The act of dividing something into thin, flat pieces by making one or more cuts through it, typically with a sharp-edged implement.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of dividing something into thin, flat pieces by making one or more cuts through it, typically with a sharp-edged implement.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of splitting into smaller parts something that was itself already a part obtained by an earlier splitting, so that a whole once broken into pieces has one of those pieces broken further.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of separating into smaller parts something that has already been parted from a larger whole; a further partition by which a portion produced by an earlier splitting is itself broken into constituent parts.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act or process of dividing something that has already been divided into parts, creating smaller divisions within those existing parts.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act of separating an already distinct portion of something into two or more still smaller parts.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of separating something that has already been separated into parts, producing smaller parts within those existing parts.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: The act of separating something that already consists of parts into further, smaller parts.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of separating something that already consists of parts into further, smaller parts.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of tormenting another person by repeated, persistent, unwelcome attacks, pressure, or criticism, done so as to make them feel distressed over an extended time.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of persistently troubling another person through repeated hostile deeds and disparaging words over a period of time, done so that the person suffers continuing distress.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of subjecting someone to repeated, unwanted attacks, criticism, or hostile behavior intended to cause them distress, done persistently over time despite the person's evident displeasure.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act of repeatedly subjecting someone to unwanted attacks or hostile criticism, thereby troubling, intimidating, or distressing that person over time.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of repeatedly directing hostile attacks and adverse criticism at someone over an extended period, causing distress through their persistence.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: Conduct consisting of repeated hostile attacks or criticisms directed at a person over time, so as to torment, intimidate, or seriously distress that person.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of subjecting someone to repeated, unwanted attacks, criticism, or hostile behavior intended to cause them distress, done persistently over time despite the person's evident displeasure.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The activity of trying to catch fish or other water animals, engaged in for pleasure or recreation rather than for a living.

glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of attempting to catch fish, typically pursued as a leisure activity or sport rather than as a primary livelihood; casting line or net into water with the intention of capturing fish.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A recreational activity of trying to catch finned aquatic animals, typically with a hook and line, undertaken for pleasure rather than livelihood or subsistence.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of attempting to catch fish as a pastime, undertaken for amusement or relaxation rather than for livelihood or immediate practical need.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: An outdoor recreational activity in which someone attempts to catch aquatic animals living in rivers, lakes, or the sea.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The activity of trying to catch fish or other water animals, engaged in for pleasure or recreation rather than for a living.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act by which someone breaks up the settled, orderly working of something, so that what had been proceeding well no longer does and things become confused or fall into disorder.
