glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: An act by which someone causes an orderly state or process to become disordered, broken, or unable to continue as it was; a deliberate or forceful disturbance that interrupts the normal functioning of something.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: An act that causes an established arrangement or regular course to lose its order, so that its elements or activities no longer proceed together in the expected way.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: An act that breaks the established arrangement or regular continuity of something, leaving it less orderly and less able to proceed as before.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: An act that brings an established activity, arrangement, or state into disorder, preventing it from proceeding in its normal or intended course.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of disturbing an established arrangement or working order of things so that it can no longer continue as before, bringing an ongoing course of events to a halt.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of disturbing a settled and functioning order or arrangement so severely that it ceases to operate and cannot continue as before.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The event of disrupting an established pattern or order of things, causing it to cease functioning as it did before; a breaking-apart of what had been held together or working smoothly.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: An event in which an established arrangement or course of activity is so severely disturbed that its orderly continuation becomes impossible.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: An event in which an established arrangement is disturbed so that an ongoing course of affairs can no longer continue, especially when shared human activities or relations are thereby thrown into disorder.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: An act or event that interrupts an established order or course of dealings, so that it cannot continue as it had done.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of shaping or adapting something so that it becomes fit to serve one particular purpose well, at the cost of being less fit for other purposes.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of making something fit for one particular purpose or use, adapting it so that it serves that single end rather than serving many ends generally.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of adapting or modifying something to suit a particular purpose, function, or specific circumstance, rather than serving general or multiple uses.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act of adapting something so that it is particularly suited to a narrowly delimited purpose or function.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of adapting something for one particular use or function, thereby making it less general and more suited to that end.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: The act of adapting something so that it is suited to a particular, narrowly defined use or function rather than to general use.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of adapting something so that it is suited to a particular, narrowly defined use or function rather than to general use.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of treating a sick person or a diseased body by giving them a substance intended to remove or lessen their illness, so that they may become well again.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of administering remedies or curative substances to a person who is unwell, undertaken so that the disorder in the body may be relieved and health restored.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of treating a person or part of the body with medicines or remedies in order to cure disease, relieve pain, or restore health.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act of administering a therapeutic substance or other remedy to prevent, relieve, or cure illness, injury, or bodily disorder.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of giving someone or something a substance or applying a remedy to relieve, prevent, or cure an illness or bodily disorder.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: An act in which a person gives or applies a curative drug or remedy to someone in order to treat, prevent, or relieve disease or bodily disorder.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of giving someone or something a substance or applying a remedy to relieve, prevent, or cure an illness or bodily disorder.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of one living creature hunting, killing, and eating another living creature as food.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act by which one animal hunts, kills, and eats another animal as food; a predatory relation in which a living creature captures and consumes prey for sustenance.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act of an animal hunting and killing another animal in order to eat its body for nourishment.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: An act in which one living creature kills and consumes another living creature as food.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: An act in which one organism kills another and consumes its body as food.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of one living creature hunting, killing, and eating another living creature as food.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of misleading someone into believing what is not true, so as to gain something at that person's expense.
glosses.claude-fable-5: An act by which someone misleads another person into accepting as true something the actor knows to be untrue, especially so as to cheat or swindle that person out of something of value.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of defrauding or swindling someone by making them believe something false, so as to gain possession of money or goods that belong to them.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: An act by which one person deliberately causes another to accept as true what is false, typically to gain an advantage at the other's expense.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of deliberately causing someone to accept something untrue, especially by dishonest trickery intended to secure an advantage or induce the surrender of something valuable.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: An act of deceiving someone by fraudulent means in order to obtain money, property, or another advantage from that person.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of protecting something by enclosing it in material that stops or lessens the passing of heat, sound, or electric current between it and its surroundings.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of shielding something by enclosing it in a material through which sound, heat, or electric current cannot readily pass, so that such influences do not reach or escape the enclosed thing.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of surrounding or covering something with material that stops or greatly reduces the passage of heat, sound, or electrical current through it.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act of protecting something by enclosing it in material that retards or prevents the transmission of heat, sound, or electricity.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of protecting something by enclosing or surrounding it with a material that impedes the passage of heat, sound, or electricity.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: The act of protecting something from the passage of heat, sound, or electricity by enclosing or covering it with a material that reduces or prevents that passage.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of protecting something by enclosing or surrounding it with a material that impedes the passage of heat, sound, or electricity.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of washing, dressing, and grooming oneself, done so that afterward one's body looks the way one wants others to see it.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of grooming and dressing oneself, in which a person washes and arranges the body and puts on clothing so as to become presentable to others.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of washing, grooming, and dressing oneself; the daily ritual of personal preparation involving cleansing of the body and donning of clothes.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act of grooming and clothing oneself so as to be personally prepared for what follows.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of grooming, clothing, and otherwise making one's body ready for the day or for an intended activity.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: The routine of washing, grooming, and arranging one's clothing and person in preparation for the day or for social activity.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of grooming and dressing oneself, in which a person washes and arranges the body and puts on clothing so as to become presentable to others.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The event within a woman's body in which a new living being begins to exist through the joining of a seed from a man with an egg from her, so that a life not present before now grows inside her.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The event with which a pregnancy begins: the union of a male reproductive cell with a female egg cell inside a woman's body, whereby a new living human individual comes into existence.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The biological event in which a spermatozoon unites with an ovum, initiating the development of a new organism and the beginning of pregnancy.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: A reproductive event in which a sperm cell fuses with an ovum, producing a fertilized ovum and initiating pregnancy.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The event in which a sperm cell fertilizes an ovum, marking the beginning of pregnancy and the ensuing development of an embryo.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: The biological event in which a sperm cell fertilizes an ovum, thereby beginning the development of a new organism and initiating pregnancy.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of watching attentively over a period of time in order to see something that may come or happen, so as to know of it before others do.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of keeping attentive watch over a place for a time, directing one's gaze so as to notice at once anything that may happen or arrive there.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of watching or observing attentively, especially to detect something or to maintain awareness of one's surroundings; a directed gaze outward or forward to perceive what lies ahead.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: An act of directing one's sight outward from one's position in order to observe the surrounding area or what may be approaching.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of deliberately watching for someone or something that may come into view or occur, from a particular place.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: An act of directing one’s gaze outward from a place or position in order to observe the area beyond it, especially for signs of something that may be approaching or happening there.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of keeping attentive watch over a place for a time, directing one's gaze so as to notice at once anything that may happen or arrive there.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of directing one's eyes at something so as to take it in, that is, an occasion of someone deliberately looking at and seeing a thing.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of looking at something for a time in order to perceive it with the eyes; a deliberate exercise of vision by which one takes in, and comes to know something about, an object or scene.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of deliberately looking at or observing someone or something, often in order to examine or understand it; a period of directed attention through sight.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: An act of directing visual attention toward a person, thing, or place and thereby perceiving its presence or character.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of looking at or observing something, in which someone directs visual attention toward it.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: An act of directing one's gaze or attention toward something in order to see or examine it.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: An act of directing one's gaze or attention toward something in order to see or examine it.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of making a deep hole downward into the ground in order to obtain the liquid substance held beneath it that people can burn for fuel.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of cutting a deep, narrow hole down into the earth with machinery, undertaken in the hope that petroleum lying beneath the surface will be found and brought up.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of drilling a deep hole into the earth's surface by rotational cutting or percussion, undertaken with the intention of reaching and extracting petroleum or other subsurface resources.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act of making a deep, narrow hole in the earth by mechanical means, undertaken in the hope of reaching and extracting petroleum.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of making a hole by penetrating the earth with a drilling implement, undertaken in the hope that petroleum will thereby be produced.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: An operation in which a deep, narrow shaft is made in the ground in order to reach subterranean petroleum and bring it to the surface for production.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of making a deep, narrow hole in the earth by mechanical means, undertaken in the hope of reaching and extracting petroleum.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of devising something new by thought, so that a thing comes to exist which no one had made or known before.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of bringing into existence, through deliberate thought, a thing of a kind that did not exist before; a making whose product is new to the world rather than a copy of what already is.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of creating or producing something new that did not exist before; a deliberate act of thinking and making by which someone brings into being a thing or process previously unknown.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act of devising, through thought, a novel device, process, method, or idea that did not previously exist in that form.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of devising a new idea, method, or object by imaginative thought and deliberate making, so that what had not previously been conceived or made is brought into existence.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: The act of devising through original thought or experiment a new device, method, or process not previously made or known.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of devising something new by thought, so that a thing comes to exist which no one had made or known before.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The violent seizing and carrying off of goods, together with the wanton destruction of a place, committed by an armed force overrunning a country in war.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of plundering a country in war; the violent seizure and carrying off of the goods of its inhabitants by an armed force, leaving the place stripped and its people harmed.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of systematically plundering and destroying a country or region in warfare, seizing and carrying off goods, valuables, and resources by force.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act of stripping a country of goods and resources through widespread violent seizure and destruction during warfare.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of forcibly plundering a country during warfare, taking or destroying its wealth and resources and inflicting grave harm on its inhabitants.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: An act of violent plundering in which invading forces strip a country or region of its people’s goods during war.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of plundering a country in war; the violent seizure and carrying off of the goods of its inhabitants by an armed force, leaving the place stripped and its people harmed.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of bringing many separate things together into one place, so that what had been apart comes to be close together in a single group.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of bringing together things that lie in different places, so that by someone's doing they come to be assembled in one place.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of bringing together or collecting things from different places into one place, accumulating them so that they are now together.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: An act of bringing separate or scattered things together into one place, group, or collection.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of collecting separate things and bringing them together in one place or group.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: An act by which someone brings separate things or people into one place or group, thereby making them into a collection.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of collecting separate things and bringing them together in one place or group.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of holding something up by placing a firm support beneath or against it, so that it does not fall or give way.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of keeping a weakened structure from falling or collapsing by setting stout timbers or braces beneath or against it, so that its weight is carried and it remains in place.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of supporting or propping up something that is in danger of falling or collapsing, using struts, supports, or other bracing devices placed against or under it.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act of supporting a weak or endangered structure with posts or beams set beneath or against it to prevent collapse or displacement.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of temporarily supporting a thing by placing a separate prop against or beneath it, so that it does not fall, collapse, or shift.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: An act of placing one or more rigid props against a structure or other object to hold it steady and prevent it from falling or collapsing.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The state of someone or something living in a particular place and remaining there over a long stretch of time, so that this place is where they continuously reside.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act or condition of living in a place over an extended period as one's settled abode, whether the dweller is a person or an animal; sustained residence in a location.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act or state of living permanently or for an extended time in a particular place, dwelling there as one's regular home or habitual residence.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The sustained state of a person or animal living in a particular place as its settled home, rather than staying there temporarily.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of living in a particular place as one's permanent dwelling, whether by a person or an animal.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: The act or state of residing in a place as one's settled home, consisting in continued life there rather than a brief or occasional stay.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act or state of living permanently or for an extended time in a particular place, dwelling there as one's regular home or habitual residence.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act by which one body or person comes to be joined to another, larger organization, so that afterward it belongs to it as a recognized part of it.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act by which a person or organization becomes formally joined to another body, entering through an explicit declaration or agreement into a recognized connection that did not hold before.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act or event of formally joining or becoming connected with an organization, group, or larger body, so that one is now part of it or bound to it by commitment or membership.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act by which a person, group, or institution becomes joined to another body through an officially recognized and continuing association.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act by which one organization or institution becomes formally connected with another through an officially recognized arrangement, thereby joining the two in an established relationship.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: An act by which a person or organization becomes formally linked with another, thereby entering an acknowledged institutional association or membership.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act by which a person, group, or institution becomes joined to another body through an officially recognized and continuing association.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of giving back to a person money that they had earlier handed over, so that they again have what they gave.
glosses.claude-fable-5: An act by which someone gives back to another person money earlier received from that person, so that what was handed over comes to be in the original giver's possession again.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of giving back money that was previously received, returning funds to their source as restitution or settlement of an obligation.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act of giving money back to the person or organization from whom it was previously received.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act by which a person gives back money previously received, restoring it to the person who provided it.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: An act of giving back money that one has previously received, typically to the person from whom it was paid, thereby reversing or discharging the earlier payment.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of giving back to a person money that they had earlier handed over, so that they again have what they gave.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of paying out money in order to obtain goods or services, whereby one gives up a sum one holds so as to receive something wanted in return.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of paying out money to another party in order to obtain goods or services; the handing over of money in return for things or work supplied.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of using up money or financial resources by giving them in exchange for goods or services; a disbursement or outlay of funds.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act of giving money in exchange for goods or services received or to be received.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of giving money in exchange for goods or services, thereby using part of one's available funds to obtain something wanted.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: The act of using money to obtain goods or services, by giving it in payment and thereby diminishing the funds available to the person or organization making the payment.

per_concept.consensus_gloss: The act of giving money in exchange for goods or services received or to be received.

glosses.claude-opus-4-8: The act of forcing someone to do something against their will by threatening harm or bringing pressure to bear, so that they act not because they wish to but because they fear what will otherwise befall them.
glosses.claude-fable-5: The act of making someone do something they do not want to do by force, threats, or the pressure of superior power, so that the person complies out of fear of harm rather than by free choice.
glosses.claude-haiku-4-5: The act of compelling someone to do something against their will by using force, threats, or the authority of one's position; the use of power to constrain another's freedom of choice.
glosses.gpt-5.6-sol: The act of making someone act against their will through the exercise or threat of superior power or official authority.
glosses.gpt-5.6-luna: The act of causing another person to do something against their will through the exercise of power or recognized authority over them.
glosses.gpt-5.6-terra: The act by which a person uses authoritative power to make another person perform or forbear an action against that person's will.
